title: Agent provenance
description: Provenance record an agent must write to .agent/provenance.json before its final commit (US-029/US-030).

run_id.description: Unique id for this agent run.

task.description: What the run was asked to do.

prompt_hash.description: Hash of the system prompt used.

scope_anchor.description: Reference to the CP1-approved plan hash for this work. Optional during grace period ending 2026-08-02 per US-071; will become required in follow-up story that depends on US-066 (CP3 gate).
scope_anchor.$comment: US-071 Phase 1 (this PR): field added optional. US-071 Phase 2 (follow-up, blocked on US-066): field becomes required + CP3 gate enforces comparison.
